description: Use this API to return model name of the CCT switched shunt other type models. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr, model = cctmdlnam_swso_2(ibus, id)

error_codes.description: No error; MODEL name is returned.
bus not in case; MODEL name is returned as blank.
No switched shunt other type model attached to the specified switched shunte.
Dynamics data not present in working memory.
